textByHash.d3ee21dcb76946d449429ef17271e3568f1b056f: Nilsal, iknami. What can I do for you today?
textByHash.d075fa1b4d1b674d10ff06cfbfcdfacd82eb5baa: Ah, yes. Apologies, iknami, but we've been dealing with a bit of a wolf problem recently and it's delayed some of our orders.
textByHash.19e20ab8be2d1b239ac2fad52bd4a9778b2fc3f8: Well we'd never say no to some extra help, and it would mean we'd be able to get working on Emelio's order faster.
textByHash.2f9415bc440f1e681b231c67c2532f50127067ed: The wolves have a den directly west of here. Most of them don't cause too much of a problem, but there's a big one that we've been struggling with.
textByHash.52c1eeebc0365c7002070df7f40c1cb26a682f83: Nilsal, iknami. Any luck with that wolf?
textByHash.19c3dce962a1386253507305f21bbf9a306312ce: You'll find the den directly west of here. Remember, it's the big one that we need dealing with.
textByHash.684e6210bfb2fe57e883816ae1314d120920e6da: Kuani! Thank you so much for the help, iknami. While you were gone, I was able to get Emelio's order finished. It's on the way to him now.
textByHash.7e10c61cb28aa30e5899cb264cd2cd77b0998f8a: Not a problem. Until next time, iknami.
textByHash.42515c1e1b9cc273d6804e37ae4b3fdc8d86086e: Nilsal, iknami. I can't stop to talk I'm afraid. We're having trouble with one of the alpacas again
textByHash.65b47e211377378245fa14d22724cb02abc1dbd3: Nilsal, iknami. Anything I can do for you today?
textByHash.2859fb0536add65207dddb0955f9af2c762ebf91: Well in that case, have a good day, iknami.
